subject: [PATCH pynfs v2 09/25] server41tests: test link triggers dir delegation recall

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test case to the server41tests suite, which verifies that a directory delegation recall is triggered when a file is hard-linked from another client. The test creates a dir delegation with no notification mask, then creates a file and links it to a new name from a second client. It checks that the server issues a CB_RECALL in response. This patch aims to ensure that the NFSv4.1 server correctly handles directory delegation recalls triggered by link operations.
